message:
Use hashmap_helper in generated runtime code for sets

- Generated set literals now use hashmap_helper.StringHashMap (ArrayHashMap + wyhash)
- Added set literal analysis to analyzer.zig for needs_hashmap_helper flag
- Fixed tokenizer package import paths (../../ -> ../../../)
- Consistent fast hashmap across compiler AND generated runtime code

files.patch:
@@ -73,6 +73,7 @@ pub const TokenType = enum {
     DoubleSlashEq,
     PercentEq,
     StarStarEq,
+    ColonEq, // Walrus operator :=
 
     // Delimiters
     LParen,
